claims.text: The invention claimed is: 1. An ophthalmic solution consisting of: about 0.005% (w/v) of latanoprost; about 5% (w/v) of macrogol glycerol hydroxystearate 40; about 0.1% (w/v) of carbomer 974P; about 0...
3. A method for treating open-angle glaucoma or reducing intraocular pressure comprising administration of a solution of claim 1 to an individual in need thereof.
